name: Stolen DATS Badge
effect: As a Basic Action, present this badge to bluff your way past low-level DATS checkpoints or convince Digimon that you have official authority. Make a Broadcast check DN 11. On a success the bluff holds for this scene. On a failure you are identified and the GM determines the consequence. Does not work on DATS agents who know the bearer personally.
notes: Broadcast check DN 11. Fails against agents who know the bearer. One scene per use.
